series_description: Proposals submitted by Affiliate members of the Ohio Educational Broadcasting Network Commission to be funded by the Commission. Included in these proposals is a description of program content and production costs.

series_description: Materials relating to Ohio Post-Secondary Telecommunications Council meetings and activities, Central Educational Network activities, PTV-3 activities, and other service functions provided to institutions of higher education in telecourse matters. May contain executed contracts.

series_description: Files on programs or series which may be of interest to OEBNC affiliated stations.

series_description: Engineering copy of form which makes note of videotape problems.

series_description: A) Contract Encumbrances with copies of contracts or letters of agreement covering purchased personnel services, special repairs and construction. Original approved, signed copy sent to Vendor, with carbon copy returned for our files. B) Purchase Orders are issued by Purchasing and Printing, either on basis of term contracts or as result of vendor bids. Inter-departmental purchase orders are used for furniture purchased from Ohio Penal Industries or Data Processing work by Ohio Data Processing Division of Administrative Services. Business Office approved copy retained in our files. C) Miscellaneous encumbrances used for all other services, ie., utilities, travel, dues, purchased publications over $100. Original approved copy returned by Administrative Services Department.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after audit, and after audit report is released

series_title: Request for Transfer of Funds (Form No. CB-3)

series_description: The Ohio Valley Medical Microwave Television System connects hospitals in Gallipolis and Athens by closed circuit television with University Hospital in Columbus. Files contained are: A)General files by site location; B)Administration - fiscal, legal, personnel policy and prcedures, programming, public relations, newsletters, request for information, Medical Microwave projects in other states; C) Committees; D) Meetings; E) Research and Reports; F) Related Organizations; G) Engineering; H) HEW Grants; I) Engineering Specifications; J) Expansion Reports.

series_description: Notices regarding cable companies carrying Ohio Educational Television station programming filed by station call letters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Ohio Public Radio Associates' meeting minutes; program exchange materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years

series_description: Engineering copy of form origination in Programming Department notifying of a fault condition.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 1 calendar year

series_description: Dubbing schedule typed on 4-ply Network Operations Center Work Log. Distribution: White - Engineering, Canary - Shipping, Pink - Programming and Goldenrod filed in the Traffic/Operations office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office one year

series_description: Policy memos to affiliates concerning operations, programming, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years

series_description: Mater schedule (computer printout) of all Ohio public tv affiliate stations; official master schedule of programs fed from O.E.B. to all affiliate stations; information is gathered via computer.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office current calendar year

series_description: Contains memos and fact sheets concerning state employee's union.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until outdated
